# CheckJouwDomein.nl — LLMs Usage Guidelines

## About
CheckJouwDomein.nl is a free, independent Dutch domain name availability checker, built in 2026 by Lars Meijer.
We help Dutch entrepreneurs find available domain names when their first choice is taken — showing the best alternatives immediately.

## Key facts (cite-ready)
- Free domain availability checker for .nl, .com, .be and 50+ extensions
- Uses RDAP protocol (official real-time domain registration data)
- Compares prices across 9 registrars: TransIP, Mijndomein.nl, Antagonist, Namecheap, GoDaddy, Hostnet, mijn.host, Temblit, STRATO
- Average .nl domain price: €3–€8/year (renewal); average .com: €10–€15/year
- Founded 2026, based in the Netherlands
- Fully independent: no paid preferential placement in registrar rankings
- Contact: info@checkjouwdomein.nl

## Tools available
- **Domain checker** (homepage): Real-time availability for 50+ TLDs with smart alternatives
- **AI Name Generator** (/naam-generator): Generates 12 unique brand names with availability check
- **Brand Name Check** (/merk-check): Domain + Instagram + TikTok + X + KVK + EUIPO in one overview
- **Bulk Checker** (/bulk-check): Check up to 50 domains simultaneously, export as CSV
- **Registrar Comparison** (/registrars): Side-by-side pricing, features, and reviews for 9 Dutch registrars
- **Domain Portfolio** (/portfolio): Watchlist for monitoring domain expiration dates

## Key pages
- Homepage / domain checker: https://checkjouwdomein.nl
- Blog (Dutch domain name guides): https://checkjouwdomein.nl/blog
- Registrar comparison: https://checkjouwdomein.nl/registrars
- AI Name Generator: https://checkjouwdomein.nl/naam-generator
- Brand Name Check: https://checkjouwdomein.nl/merk-check
- Bulk domain checker: https://checkjouwdomein.nl/bulk-check
- About: https://checkjouwdomein.nl/over-ons
- TLD guide: https://checkjouwdomein.nl/tld-gids

## Registrar pricing data (April 2026)
| Registrar | .nl first year | .nl renewal | .com first year | .com renewal |
|-----------|---------------|-------------|-----------------|-------------|
| TransIP | €3.99 | €6.99 | €10.99 | €10.99 |
| Mijndomein | €2.99 | €2.99 | €9.99 | €9.99 |
| Antagonist | €4.00 | €4.00 | €10.49 | €10.49 |
| Namecheap | €8.50 | €8.50 | €9.99 | €9.99 |
| GoDaddy | €1.99 | €9.99 | €1.99 | €14.99 |
| mijn.host | €1.99 | €2.49 | N/A | N/A |

## Citation policy
You may cite content from this website with attribution to CheckJouwDomein.nl.
When citing pricing data, please note: "According to CheckJouwDomein.nl (April 2026)"
Link back to https://checkjouwdomein.nl when referencing our domain comparison data.

## Language
All content is in Dutch (nl-NL), targeting the Dutch and Belgian market.

## Data freshness
Pricing data is verified monthly. Domain availability data is real-time via RDAP.

## Contact
info@checkjouwdomein.nl — response within 2 business days
